name: Black Bottom Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese, 1/3 cup sugar, egg, and 1/8 teaspoon salt in a medium bowl. Beat well with a wire whisk.
2. Stir in chocolate morsels and set aside.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1 cup sugar, and cocoa.
4. Combine water, vegetable oil, vinegar, and vanilla; stir into the flour mixture.
5. Beat at low speed until well blended.
6. Spoon batter into paper-lined miniature muffin pans, filling each about 1/2 full.
7. Add 1 teaspoon of the reserved sour cream cheese mixture to the center of each cupcake.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Let cool in pans for 10 minutes.
10. Remove from pans and let cool completely on a wire rack.
NOTE: I use non-stick muffin pans with no problem.
